meaning: n.箱柜 [计] 二进制文件的扩展名
examples: I kicked a rubbish bin very hard and broke my toe.
She scrunched up three pages of notes and threw them in the bin.
Now, thousands of mailshots, catalogues and sales pitches go straight into the bin.
"I read it, ripped it up and put it in the bin, " he said.
Officials at Georgetown and Harvard defend their decision to accept the grant from bin Talal.
